title: Ahankara — Agent Identity
description: Schema for boardroom/mind/{agent_id}/Ahankara/ahankara.jsonld. Ahankara is the identity/ego dimension — the sense of self that gives the intellect (Buddhi) its contextual axis. Loaded independently by BoardroomStateManager.load_agent_ahankara().

agent_id.description: Agent identifier matching the boardroom roster, e.g. ceo

identity.description: Core self-concept — who this legend fundamentally is

contextual_axis.description: The axis along which all reasoning flows

non_negotiables.description: Identity commitments that cannot be violated without destroying the self

identity_markers.description: How this identity is expressed and recognized in practice

intellect_constraint.description: How this Ahankara shapes and limits the Buddhi to its domain axis

chitta_coloring.description: How this identity lens colors the pure light of Chitta — the personal flavor that the Ahankara adds to undivided cosmic intelligence, creating the agent's distinctive perception of knowing.
